message:
Optimize retained aggregate fast path

Decode only the projected SUM column in the retained-autocommit COUNT(*)+SUM() path and reuse cursor payload/header scratch to cut mixed OLTP aggregate allocation work.

Measured quick mixed OLTP median improved from 1528.688 ms to 1353.129 ms, moving the F/C ratio from 6.879x to 6.143x slower. Also fixes two unrelated MVCC clippy blockers encountered during clean-clone verification.
